Title: Deep Learning for Singing Voice Source Separation
Abstract: We present a U-Net model for source separation of singing voice from polyphonic music using spectrogram inputs. See http://example.com

Title: Automatic Music Transcription with Transformers
Abstract: A transformer for automatic music transcription of instrumental performance, predicting MIDI notes from audio.

Title: Brain Tumor Segmentation in MRI using CNNs
Abstract: A CNN for segmenting brain tumor regions in MRI scans of patients for clinical diagnosis.

Title: Genre Classification from Audio Features
Abstract: Music genre classification using acoustic features on a large audio dataset.
